examples_json: [{"en":"I was tired but I finished my work.","zh":"我很累但是完成了工作。"}]
[{"en":"She likes reading and swimming.","zh":"她喜欢阅读和游泳。"}]
[{"en":"He is outgoing whereas I am shy.","zh":"他外向而我内向。"}]
[{"en":"I stayed home because I was sick.","zh":"我待在家因为我病了。"}]
[{"en":"He didn't study therefore he failed.","zh":"他没学习所以没通过。"}]

difficulty: Although it was raining we went out.
description: zh:虽然下着雨但我们还是出去了。

column9: [{"en":"When I got home I cooked dinner.","zh":"我到家时做了晚饭。"}]
[{"en":"If it rains I will stay home.","zh":"如果下雨我就待在家。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"The person who helped me was very kind.","zh":"帮助我的那个人很善良。"}]
[{"en":"The book which I borrowed was great.","zh":"我借的那本书很好。"}]
